title: Static Vines
description: Stops Cave and Weeping Vines From Growing Naturally! Also includes kelp and normal vines!
body:
🌿 Static Vines

Tired of cave or weeping vines taking over your caves? Maybe you want to include kelp in your builds? Static Vines keeps them right where you want them, no string or shears necessary!

This lightweight mod stops random ticking and natural growth of; cave vines, weeping vines, kelp, and normal vines so they won’t spread out of control.

✨ But don’t worry — everything else works as normal:

✅ All generate naturally.

✅ You can bonemeal them for controlled growth.

✅ You can place, harvest, and farm them like usual.

✅ Dynamic config that give you control over what grows naturally and what doesn't (no reloading necessary).

🛠 Why Use Static Vines?

Prevents your caves and bases from becoming overgrown.

Keeps the vanilla feel without unnecessary changes.

Simple, clean, and 100% compatible with other mods.

Take back control of your builds — keep your forever growing greenery static 🌱
